title: Norm
description: Governance DNA archetype for Norm — measurable constraint predicates (DNA 'N'). Standalone first-class GSM class with independent lifecycle, typed by NormArchetype. Fields: structure, guard, predicate, toleranceMode, temporalWindow, temporalAggregation, sustainedThreshold.

structure.description: Reference to the authoring Structure. May differ from the Directive's authoring Structure.

guard.description: CEL expression conforming to the applicability-guard CEL profile — activation condition. Predicate is only evaluated when guard evaluates to true. Default: 'true' (unconditional activation).

predicate.description: CEL expression conforming to the property-assertion CEL profile, returning boolean. The constraint. References exactly one Archetype by name as root identifier, then navigates its JSON Schema fields. Example: SecurityProperties.encryptionLevel >= 'AES-128'.

toleranceMode.description: How violations are measured over time.

temporalWindow.description: ISO 8601 duration for time-based tolerance modes. Required when toleranceMode is time-based (AGGREGATED, SUSTAINED).

temporalAggregation.description: Aggregation function applied to values within the temporalWindow.

sustainedThreshold.description: Ratio [0,1] — fraction of temporalWindow the predicate must hold. Required when toleranceMode = SUSTAINED.
